description: Recto: An amulet or talisman for protection, beginning with a chapter on charms and protections "bāb al-ḥirz l-aʿẓam". Verso: Magical recipe or charm involving an egg, writing something 49 times on it which leads to someone's birth in hell. Needs further investigation.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
